posts.text:
The NYPD’s Aaron Edwards, who leapt over a barricade to tackle the would be terrorists in New York City, says “I’m just trying to get the bad guys.” How has Mamdani not invited this hero to Gracie Mansion and honored him? Shameful:

Video

posts.text: The more money you make the crazier it is to pay 15% of your income to a state. I can’t believe anyone wealthy does this. Now add in that the quality of life in Tennessee, Texas and Florida is better too and you’re paying way more to live in a way worse place. That’s bonkers.
posts.quote: The more money you make the crazier it is to pay 15% of your income to a state. I can’t believe anyone wealthy does this. Now add in that the quality of life in Tennessee, Texas and Florida is better too and you’re paying way more to live in a way worse place. That’s bonkers.

posts.text: As the red state shift grows in these blue states the tax base shrinks, necessitating even higher taxes on those left behind. Which further propels the moves to red states. Meanwhile red states are now able to lower taxes, creating more incentives for movers. It’s a HUGE story.
posts.quote: As the red state shift grows in these blue states the tax base shrinks, necessitating even higher taxes on those left behind. Which further propels the moves to red states. Meanwhile red states are now able to lower taxes, creating more incentives for movers. It’s a HUGE story.

posts.text: This movement isn’t slowing down, it’s accelerating. Covid created the first of these moves, but now blue states are enacting draconian taxes on the wealthy and corporations and people are fed up and bailing. The red state advantage is growing every day. This is seismic change.
posts.quote: This movement isn’t slowing down, it’s accelerating. Covid created the first of these moves, but now blue states are enacting draconian taxes on the wealthy and corporations and people are fed up and bailing. The red state advantage is growing every day. This is seismic change.

posts.text: The biggest story in America right now is the movement of super wealthy people and big corporations from high tax states like California, Illinois and New York to zero income tax states like Tennessee, Texas and Florida. And every day it becomes a bigger story.
posts.quote: The biggest story in America right now is the movement of super wealthy people and big corporations from high tax states like California, Illinois and New York to zero income tax states like Tennessee, Texas and Florida. And every day it becomes a bigger story.

posts.text:
This story should be receiving far more attention from both the sports media and national media. The silence from the Megan Rapinoe’s of the soccer world is deafening.


Eyal Yakoby (@EYakoby)

BREAKING: The Iranian women’s soccer team is being held in Malaysia.

Numerous players have reached out to Malaysian police, saying that they don’t want to return to Iran.

Video
  




— https://nitter.net/EYakoby/status/2031770933866668219#m

posts.text:
Well said.


U.S. Senator John Fetterman (@SenFettermanPA)

In Iran, life is oppression and brutality.  

These courageous women were facing severe consequences, even their families threatened.

How many of the people who criticized our Men’s Hockey team condemned Iran’s treatment of its Women’s Soccer team?




— https://nitter.net/SenFettermanPA/status/2031520495342907683#m

posts.text: We’ve seen justices — Ruth Bader Ginsberg most prominently — who have refused to step down & seen their legacies largely overturned by their successors. There is lots of uncertainty ahead and 2026 is the last guaranteed year for Trump to replace a Justice.
posts.quote: We’ve seen justices — Ruth Bader Ginsberg most prominently — who have refused to step down & seen their legacies largely overturned by their successors. There is lots of uncertainty ahead and 2026 is the last guaranteed year for Trump to replace a Justice.

posts.text: Story worth paying attention to that no one is: Justice Alito is favored in prediction markets to step down this year. Not a ton of volume, but if you were appointed by a Republican president 2026 is last guaranteed year a Republican president could replace you for many years.

state-taxes.quote: The more money you make the crazier it is to pay 15% of your income to a state. I can’t believe anyone wealthy does this. Now add in that the quality of life in Tennessee, Texas and Florida is better too and you’re paying way more to live in a way worse place. That’s bonkers.

As the red state shift grows in these blue states the tax base shrinks, necessitating even higher taxes on those left behind. Which further propels the moves to red states. Meanwhile red states are now able to lower taxes, creating more incentives for movers. It’s a HUGE story.

This movement isn’t slowing down, it’s accelerating. Covid created the first of these moves, but now blue states are enacting draconian taxes on the wealthy and corporations and people are fed up and bailing. The red state advantage is growing every day. This is seismic change.

The biggest story in America right now is the movement of super wealthy people and big corporations from high tax states like California, Illinois and New York to zero income tax states like Tennessee, Texas and Florida. And every day it becomes a bigger story.

supreme-court.quote: We’ve seen justices — Ruth Bader Ginsberg most prominently — who have refused to step down & seen their legacies largely overturned by their successors. There is lots of uncertainty ahead and 2026 is the last guaranteed year for Trump to replace a Justice.

Story worth paying attention to that no one is: Justice Alito is favored in prediction markets to step down this year. Not a ton of volume, but if you were appointed by a Republican president 2026 is last guaranteed year a Republican president could replace you for many years.
